data.title: USDC issuance surpasses $80 billion for the first time, setting a new record.
data.description: According to Artemis data, the total issuance of USDC across the entire blockchain has exceeded $80 billion for the first time, currently standing at $81.083 billion, setting a new historical record.

data.title: The Trump administration has initiated the process of releasing U.S. oil reserves.
data.description: The Trump administration has initiated a process to massively utilize the U.S. emergency petroleum reserves, issuing a request to exchange 86 million barrels of crude oil. The Department of Energy stated in a statement Friday that oil drawn from the Strategic Petroleum Reserve, as part of the 172 million barrel release plan announced Wednesday, is expected to begin flowing into the market by the end of next week. This release of oil reserves is expected to take four months to complete and is part of a 400 million barrel action plan coordinated with other countries. Under the exchange terms, companies will return the loaned oil to the Department of Energy in the future, paying an additional amount as a premium. The Department of Energy stated earlier this week that the Trump administration has planned to replenish the Strategic Petroleum Reserve with approximately 200 million barrels of oil over the next year, 20% more than the reserves currently being used. (Jinshi)

data.title: GE Vernova and Hitachi to Explore Nuclear Reactor Opportunities in Southeast Asia
data.description: GE Vernova and Hitachi have reached an agreement to investigate the potential deployment of small modular nuclear reactors in Southeast Asia. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the collaboration between the two companies as they aim to address the region's growing energy needs with innovative nuclear technology. This partnership seeks to leverage the expertise of both firms in advancing sustainable energy solutions. The exploration of small modular reactors is part of a broader strategy to enhance energy security and reduce carbon emissions in Southeast Asia.

data.title: X Platform Product Manager: An additional $335,000 in creator incentives will be distributed, funded by incentives corresponding to those who fail to disclose information about AI-generated war videos and those who publish false information.
data.description: Nikita Bier, product manager of X platform, stated in an article on X platform that an additional $335,000 has been allocated to X platform creators this week as part of their creator revenue sharing. This funding primarily comes from: 1. users temporarily banned from receiving incentives for posting undisclosed AI-generated war videos; and 2. deductions from posts that received community warnings for publishing false information.

data.title: BP's Cascadia Project to Begin Oil Production in 2029
data.description: BP has announced plans to commence oil production from its ultra-deepwater development project, Cascadia, in 2029. According to Jin10, this initiative marks a significant step in BP's strategy to expand its deepwater operations. The Cascadia project is expected to enhance BP's production capabilities and contribute to meeting global energy demands. The project underscores BP's commitment to leveraging advanced technology for efficient resource extraction in challenging environments. Further details on the project's progress and potential impact on the energy market are anticipated as the start date approaches.

data.title: South Africa Prepares for Increased Shipping Traffic Amid Middle East Tensions
data.description: South Africa's Maritime Safety Authority announced on March 13 that it is closely monitoring the impact of Middle East tensions on global shipping routes. According to Jin10, the authority expects an increase in shipping traffic along the South African coast and has made necessary preparations to support passing vessels. Since the United States and Israel launched a large-scale military operation against Iran on February 28, shipping through the Strait of Hormuz has been disrupted. As a result, many cargo and oil tankers are opting to reroute via South Africa's Cape of Good Hope.

data.title: The POAP platform will enter maintenance mode on March 16th, during which time badge issuance will be unavailable. Existing badge collections will not be affected.
data.description: Isabel, co-founder of the on-chain badge protocol POAP, announced on the X platform that due to limited platform growth, the team has decided to transition POAP to maintenance mode starting March 16, 2026. This means: • For new issuers: After March 16, new issuers will no longer have access to the issuer interface. • For existing issuers: Existing tools can be used, and existing POAPs will remain intact. • For collectors: The collector interface will not be affected. • Technical support: APIs and existing integrations will continue to operate. • Core changes: The platform will no longer undergo active development. As resources allocated to the service are reduced, some operations may run slower. Furthermore, the team plans to develop a more underlying, open, and truly permissionless new standard for digital collectibles, and POAP may be integrated into the new system in the future (pending).

data.title: Kalshi has partnered with Cash App to facilitate user top-ups.
data.description: Kalshi, a prediction market platform, announced that it has partnered with Cash App to allow users to top up their accounts using Cash App Pay.

data.title: U.S. Energy Secretary Acts to Counter Oil Supply Disruptions
data.description:
U.S. Energy Secretary Wright has taken measures to address two significant challenges faced by the Trump administration: oil supply disruptions due to the Iran conflict and opposition from California Governor Gavin Newsom. According to PANews, Wright issued an order to facilitate the reopening of an oil pipeline off the California coast, which had been shut down by state officials since 2015. The Department of Energy described this move as a strategy to reduce reliance on oil imports through the Strait of Hormuz. 

The department's announcement highlighted that over 60% of the oil used by California refineries is sourced from overseas, with a substantial portion transported via the Strait of Hormuz, posing a significant national security threat. In a statement, Wright emphasized that this action would "strengthen America's oil supply and restore a pipeline system crucial to our national security and defense, ensuring reliable energy for military facilities on the West Coast."

data.title: Circle CEO: USYC has become the world's largest tokenized money market fund.
data.description: Circle CEO Jeremy Allaire recently stated on the X platform that Circle's USYC has become the world's largest tokenized money market fund. Tokenized vaults and repurchase agreements as collateral are an important emerging use case, and we are proud of its rapid growth. The strength of USYC lies in its ability to create and redeem USYC using USDC and smart contracts 24/7/365. Real-time fund and collateral transfers provide a better experience. (Note: According to Coingecko, USYC's market capitalization has surpassed $2.3 billion, currently reported at $2.31 billion.)

data.title: Grayscale's Ethereum Mini Trust has staked 57,600 ETH, worth approximately $121.6 million.
data.description: According to Lookonchain, Grayscale's Ethereum Mini Trust staked 57,600 ETH, worth approximately $121.6 million, five hours ago.

data.title: Circle Introduces Open-Source Tool for AI Agent Development
data.description: Circle has unveiled Circle Skills, an open-source tool designed to aid developers in creating AI agents. According to NS3.AI, this tool is part of Circle's developer platform and offers functionalities such as stablecoin payments, cross-chain transfers, wallet operations, and smart contract logic. The introduction of Circle Skills aims to enhance the capabilities of developers working with AI and blockchain technologies.

data.title: Polymarket predicts a 79% probability that USDT's market capitalization will reach $200 billion by the end of the year, and a 60% probability that USDC's market capitalization will reach $100 billion by the end of the year.
data.description: Data platform Artemis published an article on its X platform stating that Polymarket projects a 79% probability that USDT's market capitalization will reach $200 billion by the end of the year, and a 60% probability that USDC's market capitalization will reach $100 billion. This means that USDT's market capitalization (currently $184 billion) only needs to increase by 8%, and USDC's market capitalization (currently $81.1 billion) needs to increase by 23%. In comparison, by 2025, USDT's market capitalization is projected to grow by 36%, and USDC's by a staggering 72%.

data.title: Paradigm Survey Reveals Insights on U.S. Voter Engagement with Prediction Markets
data.description:
Paradigm's first public opinion survey of the year reveals significant insights into U.S. voter engagement with prediction markets. According to Odaily, the survey indicates that over one-third, approximately 36%, of American voters have engaged with prediction markets, either by placing bets or browsing for information. However, the majority of Americans remain undecided about prediction markets. Even among the 95% who have heard of them, nearly half lack a clear stance, including those who have used them.

In terms of user demographics, individuals under 50 years old make up 66% of prediction market participants, with 20% aged 18-34 and 27% aged 35-49. Non-white voters show a slightly higher usage rate of prediction markets compared to white voters, and men are significantly more likely to use these markets than women, with usage rates of 46% and 31%, respectively.

data.title: Cryptocurrency Analyst Highlights Potential Bitcoin Purchases Linked to STRC
data.description:
Cryptocurrency analyst Ragnar recently highlighted significant trading activity involving Strategy perpetual preferred stock (STRC) on the X platform. According to PANews, STRC recorded a single-day trading volume of $745 million this week. Based on an estimated 48% capital realization rate, this could potentially correspond to the purchase of approximately 5,000 bitcoins. Further analysis suggests that the funds related to STRC this week might equate to around 13,000 bitcoins.

Considering the financing ratio of approximately 1:2 between STRC and Strategy common stock, the potential bitcoin purchase scale could reach about 39,000 bitcoins. This amount is comparable to the holdings of a large bitcoin investment company. However, analysts caution that these figures are market estimates, and the actual purchase size should be confirmed by company disclosures.

Additionally, other analyses indicate that the cryptocurrency market structure has not fully transitioned to a bull market. The correlation between bitcoin and the Nasdaq 100 index remains high at 84%, suggesting that if the stock market experiences a downturn, bitcoin may face similar pressure.

data.title: The US is pushing to restart California oil pipelines to reduce its reliance on energy exports via the Strait of Hormuz.
data.description: U.S. Energy Secretary Frank Wright took action on Friday to retaliate against two of the Trump administration's biggest adversaries: the oil supply disruptions caused by the war with Iran, and California Governor Gavin Newsom. Wright issued an order clearing the way for a company operating off the California coast to restart an oil pipeline that had been shut down by state officials since 2015. The Department of Energy characterized the move as a way to reduce reliance on oil imports via the Strait of Hormuz. "Today, more than 60 percent of the oil used by California refineries comes from overseas, a significant portion of which is transported through the Strait of Hormuz—a serious national security threat," the Department of Energy wrote in a statement. Wright said in a statement that the move would "strengthen the U.S. oil supply and restore pipeline systems critical to our national security and defense, ensuring that military installations on the West Coast have reliable energy sources essential for readiness." (Jinshi)

data.title: The Chinese-language data market analysis platform "Feixiaohao" is reportedly set to be acquired by UTime for US$80 million.
data.description: Feixiaohao Technology Inc. recently signed a letter of intent to acquire UTime Limited (Nasdaq: WTO), a Nasdaq-listed company. UTime intends to acquire 100% of Feixiaohao's equity for US$80 million ($64 million in shares/convertible bonds + US$16 million in cash). The core assets of this transaction include Feixiaohao's technology stack and database, and more importantly, the "Feixiaohao Index 100," hailed as a bellwether for the crypto market, and its associated pricing model. As a Web3 data platform serving millions of users, Feixiaohao's index system has become an important reference for asset pricing in the industry. UTime plans to deeply integrate this index capability into its mobile hardware, pioneering a new paradigm of Web3 data services: "real-time index + hardware terminal."

data.title: Hyperliquid Whale Positions Reach $3.407 Billion, Data Shows
data.description:
Hyperliquid platform whales currently hold positions totaling $3.407 billion, according to ChainCatcher. Data from Coinglass reveals that long positions account for $1.721 billion, representing 50.51% of the total, while short positions amount to $1.686 billion, making up 49.49%. The long positions have incurred a loss of $36.42 million, whereas the short positions have gained $108 million.

Among these, a significant whale address, 0xa5b0..41, has taken a 15x leveraged long position on ETH at a price of $1,991.53, resulting in an unrealized profit of $6.9977 million.

data.title: Paradigm released its first prediction market poll, showing that approximately 36% of American voters are now prediction market users.
data.description: Paradigm VP Justin Slaughter posted on the X platform that Paradigm has released its first poll report of the year, which is also the organization's first survey on prediction markets. The results show that over one-third (approximately 36%) of American voters have used prediction markets, either by placing bets or browsing them for information. Furthermore, most Americans currently do not have a clear attitude towards prediction markets. Even among the 95% of Americans who have heard of prediction markets, nearly half do not have a clear opinion (including prediction market users). In terms of user demographics, prediction market users under 50 years old account for 66%, with those aged 18-34 making up 20% and those aged 35-49 making up 27%. Non-white voters show slightly higher usage rates than white voters, and men show significantly higher usage rates than women (46% vs. 31%).

data.title: UK to Seize Assets Linked to Singapore's Largest Money Laundering Case
data.description: The United Kingdom is preparing to confiscate assets in London valued at approximately 55 million yuan, connected to relatives involved in Singapore's largest money laundering case. According to NS3.AI, the case is associated with a group referred to as the 'Fujian Gang.' This move marks a significant step in international cooperation to address financial crimes and recover illicit funds. The assets in question are believed to be tied to individuals implicated in the extensive money laundering operation, which has drawn attention from authorities worldwide. The UK’s action underscores the global effort to combat money laundering and ensure accountability for those involved in such activities.
